penalties.description: No actual peg transfer task was performed in the video - contains only PowerPoint slides with tutorial information.

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude correctly identified that this video contains only PowerPoint slides with FLS tutorial information, not an actual peg transfer task performance. GPT-4o incorrectly interpreted the content as showing task execution with timing and penalties. Since no actual task was performed, the incomplete_task penalty applies and all other scoring is null.

disagreements.rationale: No actual task was performed, so completion time is null. GPT-4o incorrectly interpreted slide content as task performance.

claude_value.description: Cannot determine completion time or task performance as no actual peg transfer task was performed in the video.

gpt_value.description: Two objects left the field of view and were not retrievable.

disagreements.rationale: Since no actual task was performed, lost_object penalties are not applicable. The fundamental issue is task non-performance.
No task phases can be detected when no actual task performance occurred.
When no task is performed, the score must be zero regardless of any other calculations.
